feature.name: Schema validation core
feature.description: Extract Cerberus Validator with nested schema rules, type coercion, and structured error aggregation without original cerberus import.
included_behaviors: validate dict documents against nested schema definitions
enforce required fields and type rules on nested mappings and lists
coerce field values during validation and reflect coerced document
aggregate nested validation failures into structured error trees
excluded_behaviors: schema_registry and rules_set_registry named schema indirection
normalization rename/default pipelines beyond coerce in tests
benchmarks, upstream tests, docs, and packaging metadata

entanglement.description: Cerberus couples schema compilation, rule dispatch, nested document walking, coercion side effects, and error-tree rewriting across validator, schema, and errors modules.
signals: DefinitionSchema expands and validates rule graphs before Validator runs
Validator walks nested mappings/lists with document_path crumbs
coerce rule mutates document values during validation
BasicErrorHandler rewrites nested ValidationError trees into v.errors

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import Validator, DocumentError, SchemaError
